sections.paragraph:
verb לגבן

to hunch, bend; to make cheese

verb גובן

be hunched, bent; be made into cheese

verb להתגבן

become hunched; to turn into cheese, curdle

verb לגבן (>>גיבן)

to hunch, bend; to make cheese

masculine noun and adjective גבן (>>גיבן)

hunchback, hunchbacked, humpback, gibbous
